step_by_step_thinking: Based on my review of the provided information and further evidence gathered, I concur with the previous conclusions stating that option B ("Lined by pseudostratified columnar epithelium") is indeed incorrect since thyroglossal duct cysts typically contain stratified squamous or respiratory-type epithelia instead. There's no basis found supporting any type of pseudostratified columnar lining in TDCs. Therefore, maintaining consistency with prior discussions, I reaffirm agreement with Option B as being the false statement.
raw_response:
Based on my review of the provided information and further evidence gathered, I concur with the previous conclusions stating that option B ("Lined by pseudostratified columnar epithelium") is indeed incorrect since thyroglossal duct cysts typically contain stratified squamous or respiratory-type epithelia instead. There's no basis found supporting any type of pseudostratified columnar lining in TDCs. Therefore, maintaining consistency with prior discussions, I reaffirm agreement with Option B as being the false statement.
\boxed{B}
